Class BatchRepositoryImpl

java.lang.Object
edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.service.repository.BatchRepositoryImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
BatchRepository
public class BatchRepositoryImpl extends Object implements BatchRepository
Repository implementation for batch data access and operations.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    CompletableFuture<Void>
    delete(Batch batch)
    Deletes a batch.
    LiveData<Batch>
    get(long id)
    Returns a single batch by ID.
    LiveData<List<Batch>>
    getAll()
    Returns all batches.
    LiveData<List<BatchWithEggGroups>>
    getAllWithGroups()
    Returns all batches together with their egg groups.

    getAllWithIncubator()
    Returns all batches together with their associated incubators.

    Returns all batches with incubator information ordered by batch number.

    Returns all batches with incubator information ordered by expected hatch date.

    Returns all batches with incubator information ordered by incubator.

    Returns all batches associated with a given incubator.

    Returns a batch together with its egg groups.

    Inserts or updates a batch.

    Saves a batch and creates its initial egg-group data for the specified breed.

    • saveWithInitialEggGroups

      public CompletableFuture<Long> saveWithInitialEggGroups(Batch batch, String breed)
      Description copied from interface: BatchRepository
      Saves a batch and creates its initial egg-group data for the specified breed.
      Specified by:
      saveWithInitialEggGroups in interface BatchRepository
      Parameters:
      batch - batch to save.
      breed - breed name used to initialize the batch's egg groups.
      Returns:
      future completing with the saved batch ID.
